hero.locations: United Kingdom · Ibiza · Costa del Sol
hero.sub: For seventeen years we have shaped and cared for some of Britain's finest properties. Today, our craft is at home on Ibiza and the Costa del Sol.

manifesto.body: Seventeen years of British craft set our standard. The Costa del Sol and Ibiza are where we hold it: one team, from the first sketch to every Friday visit.
manifesto.imageAlt: A finished Costa del Sol stone terrace in golden-hour light

hard.label: Hard Landscaping
hard.desc: Terraces, pergolas, outdoor kitchens and stonework: single projects, designed and built to last.

maintenance.label: Property Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Gardens, pools, stone care and repairs: one trusted team on a quiet monthly rhythm.

uk.name: United Kingdom

ibiza.desc: Discreet, year-round care for the island's most private estates.

cta.title: Your property, effortless.
cta.sub: Tell us about your estate. We will take care of the rest.

footer.blurb: British standards, Mediterranean know-how. One team for everything beyond the walls of the properties we care for.
footer.areas: United Kingdom · Ibiza · Costa del Sol

hardPage.heroTitle: Stone, shade and water. Built to last.
hardPage.heroSub: We design and build terraces, pergolas, outdoor kitchens and gardens for fine homes all around the world.
hardPage.heroAlt: Seafront stone terrace with pergolas and a pool
hardPage.introTitle: One project. One team. One standard.
hardPage.introBody: Hard landscaping is the architecture of the garden: the stone underfoot, the walls that hold the hillside, the pergola that throws the shade, the pool that cools the day. We design and build it as a single project, from the first sketch to the final detail.
hardPage.servicesTitle: Everything outdoors, built by one team.

items.title: Terraces, paths & patios
items.desc: Natural stone, porcelain and travertine, laid to outlast the seasons.
items.body: The ground plane sets the tone for everything above it. We cut, lay and finish stone with the precision of interior flooring: outdoors, where sun, salt and winter rain test every joint.

types.label: Travertine & natural stone
types.phrase: Cool underfoot in August. Level for decades.
types.blurb: Travertine stays walkable in the height of summer and only looks better with age. We bed every slab on a compacted, drained base and finish the edges by hand.

types.label: Mediterranean white terraces
types.phrase: Bright by day. Glowing at dusk.
types.blurb: Lime-washed walls and pale stone make the most of Andalusian light. We build them to keep that brightness: honest materials, clean falls, no shortcuts under the surface.
marks: Edges and copings finished by hand

types.label: Flagstone & crazy paving
types.phrase: Irregular by design. Precise by habit.
types.blurb: Crazy paving only looks effortless when every joint is considered. We cut, fit and point each stone so the pattern flows and the surface stays dead flat.
marks: Each stone cut to fit its neighbour
Flat enough for a dining table

items.title: Retaining walls & steps
items.desc: Levels, steps and terraced ground that turn a slope into a feature.
items.body: Sloping plots hide the best views. Retaining structures, steps and terraced levels turn an awkward gradient into usable, dramatic outdoor rooms.

types.label: Garden stairways
types.phrase: Every step lands exactly where your foot expects.
types.blurb: A good stairway disappears into the walk. We set risers to a constant rhythm and treads to a generous depth, then light them so the garden carries you up.

types.label: Terraced planting walls
types.phrase: The wall holds the hill. The planting hides the wall.
types.blurb: Terracing turns a slope into rooms. Our walls are engineered first and beautiful second, with drainage and root space built in from the start.
marks: Engineered to retain, built to drain

types.label: Sculpted stone steps
types.phrase: Curves that look poured, built stone by stone.
types.blurb: Rounded steps and flowing walls take patience and good setting-out. We shape them in masonry, render and stone so the geometry stays crisp for years.
marks: Set out with templates, not by eye

items.title: Pergolas & shade structures
items.desc: Pergolas, canopies and awnings made for long Mediterranean afternoons.
items.body: Shade decides where life happens outdoors. Our pergolas and canopies hold their line in coastal wind and full summer sun, year after year.

types.label: Climbing-plant pergolas
types.phrase: Built for the bougainvillea it will carry in five years.
types.blurb: A planted pergola is a structure with a future load. We size timbers and fixings for the mature plant, not the first season, and detail every junction to shrug off coastal wind.

types.label: Evening lounge setups
types.phrase: Where the evening slows down.
types.blurb: Shade by day, atmosphere by night. We combine structure, festoon and low seating walls so the terrace works from siesta to midnight.
marks: Lighting circuits hidden in the frame

types.label: Timber fire-pit pergolas
types.phrase: Warm enough for January. Solid enough for forever.
types.blurb: A fire pit stretches the season to twelve months. We build the surround, the seating and the canopy as one piece, with safe clearances designed in.

items.title: Outdoor kitchens & BBQ areas
items.desc: Stone-built kitchens made for real cooking and long evenings outside.
items.body: An outdoor kitchen changes how a house is used. Stone-built counters, integrated grills and honest prep space, made for real cooking rather than show.

types.label: Stone-built kitchens
types.phrase: A kitchen that will outlive the appliances.
types.blurb: Masonry counters do not warp, fade or wobble. We build in stone and render, then fit the grill, fridge and storage into a structure made to stay.

types.label: Covered kitchen terraces
types.phrase: Cook through rain. Cook through August.
types.blurb: A roof over the kitchen doubles the days you use it. We integrate structure, extraction, light and power so cooking outside feels as easy as inside.
marks: Smoke and heat managed by design

types.label: Compact grill stations
types.phrase: Small footprint. Full menu.
types.blurb: Not every terrace needs an island. A well-planned two-metre station holds the grill, the prep and the storage without crowding the table.
marks: Sized to your terrace, not a catalogue

items.title: Garden lighting
items.desc: Light that flatters the architecture and guides every path.
items.body: After dark, a garden becomes a second stage. We light trees, water and stone discreetly: atmosphere first, fittings invisible.

types.label: Path & garden lighting
types.phrase: You never see the fitting. You always see the way.
types.blurb: Good path light sits low, warm and shielded. We aim it at stone and planting, never at eyes, so the garden reads beautifully after dark.

types.label: Festoon & pergola lights
types.phrase: Party lights, engineered like permanent ones.
types.blurb: Festoon looks casual; ours is fixed properly. Tensioned catenary wires, outdoor-rated cable and dimming that takes the terrace from dinner to dancing.

types.label: Architectural uplighting
types.phrase: Your house, lit like it deserves.
types.blurb: Uplighting turns walls and trees into the night view. We balance angles and intensity so the architecture glows without a single hotspot.
marks: Angles set at night, on site
Scenes you control from your phone

items.title: Fountains & water features
items.desc: The sound of water, engineered to run clean and quiet for years.
items.body: Moving water cools the air and softens the noise of the world. We build features that run clean and quiet, with upkeep designed in from the start.

types.label: Courtyard fountains
types.phrase: The sound that makes a courtyard.
types.blurb: A fountain should murmur, not splash the paving. We tune nozzles, depths and pump speed by ear, then hide the filtration where you will never see it.

types.label: Modern water walls
types.phrase: A moving wall, quiet as rain.
types.blurb: Water walls live or die on even flow. We machine the weir true, light it from below and design access so maintenance takes minutes, not a project.

types.label: Reflecting pools
types.phrase: Still water. Twice the garden.
types.blurb: A reflecting pool doubles your best view. We build it dead level with a dark interior, a fine overflow edge and filtration sized for stillness.
marks: Dark linings for a true mirror

items.title: Irrigation systems
items.desc: Smart watering designed around your planting and local water rules.
items.body: A garden is only as good as its watering. We design zoned, automated irrigation around your planting, and around Andalucía's water rules.

types.label: Lawn sprinkler zones
types.phrase: Every blade watered. Not a drop on the path.
types.blurb: Lawn zones are geometry. We plan head positions for true head-to-head coverage, then balance run times to your soil and Andalucía's watering rules.

types.label: Pop-up heads & hardware
types.phrase: Invisible until six in the morning.
types.blurb: Hardware decides whether a system lasts. We fit commercial-grade pop-up heads and valves, flush with the lawn, serviceable without digging.
marks: Flush with the lawn when down

types.label: Bed & border micro-spray
types.phrase: Water at the roots, not on the leaves.
types.blurb: Borders want gentle, precise water. Drip and micro-spray deliver it at soil level, plant by plant, with the filtering and pressure control that keep emitters alive.

items.title: Artificial grass
items.desc: Flawless green with zero thirst, fitted to a natural finish.
items.body: Where water is precious, a perfect lawn is engineering. Premium turf on a properly built base: green in August, convincing up close.

types.label: Pool-side turf
types.phrase: Green at the water's edge. All year.
types.blurb: Pool-side turf has to handle splash, sun and bare feet. We use cool-touch premium turf on a drained base, with edges that meet the coping perfectly.

types.label: Roof terraces & courtyards
types.phrase: A lawn where a lawn is impossible.
types.blurb: Roofs and courtyards get green without soil or weight problems. We protect the waterproofing, sort the drainage and finish the edges so it reads as a lawn, not a carpet.

types.label: Natural-look finishes
types.phrase: Guests will kneel down to check.
types.blurb: The difference is in the details: mixed pile heights, a brushed-in infill and seams you cannot find. From the terrace it is simply a perfect lawn.

items.title: Estate & driveway gates
items.desc: The first impression of the property, made to work smoothly every day.
items.body: A gate works every day of the year. We build entrances that look effortless and swing, slide and lock without complaint: timber, iron or aluminium.

types.label: Carved timber gates
types.phrase: Joinery first. Decoration second.
types.blurb: A timber gate moves with the seasons; ours are built to allow it. Proper joinery, breathable finishes and hardware set for decades of daily swings.

types.label: Wrought-iron gates
types.phrase: Heavy where it matters. Effortless where you touch it.
types.blurb: Iron should feel substantial and swing like a door. We balance every leaf, weld clean and galvanise before painting so the coast cannot get a grip.

types.label: Railings & entrance ironwork
types.phrase: The details guests touch first.
types.blurb: Railings, numbers, letterboxes and lanterns: the small ironwork that finishes an entrance. We match it to the gate so the whole arrival reads as one design.
marks: Fixed into the masonry, not onto it
Primed and painted for salt air

items.title: Fencing & privacy
items.desc: Quiet boundaries that match the architecture, not the catalogue.
items.body: Privacy should not look defensive. We build fences, walls and screens that read as part of the garden: timber slats, rendered masonry, planting that softens every line.

types.label: Modern slatted fencing
types.phrase: Privacy you can still breathe through.
types.blurb: Slatted screens give privacy without building a wall. We set the spacing for your sightlines, fix invisibly and keep the lines arrow-straight over any terrain.

types.label: Walls with climbers
types.phrase: A boundary that flowers.
types.blurb: Masonry for security, planting for softness. We render the wall, build in the wires and choose climbers that thrive on this coast.

types.label: Boundary lines & screens
types.phrase: Good fences, invisible from the sunlounger.
types.blurb: Some boundaries should disappear. We run honest, durable lines where they are seen and clever screens where they are not, so the garden feels bigger than the plot.

hardPage.baBody: Every project starts with a tired space and ends with one the house is proud of.
hardPage.baNote: Illustrative image. Photography from our Costa del Sol projects is on its way.
hardPage.processTitle: From first walk to final stone.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: We walk the site with you, listen, and understand how you live outdoors.

steps.title: Design & proposal
steps.desc: A clear design, material samples and a fixed, transparent quote.

steps.title: The build
steps.desc: Our own team builds it: a clean site, a steady schedule, no surprises.

steps.title: Handover & aftercare
steps.desc: We hand it over finished, and we stay close to keep it perfect.

hardPage.areasNote: Based on the Costa del Sol. Projects on Ibiza and in the United Kingdom by arrangement.
hardPage.ctaTitle: Tell us what you want to build.
hardPage.ctaSub: Send a few photos of your space and we will come back with ideas and a clear quote.

maintenancePage.title: Property Maintenance
maintenancePage.sub: One trusted team keeping your property immaculate — whether you are there or not.
maintenancePage.introBody: A great property is never finished — it is looked after. Week after week, season after season, one team covers everything beyond your walls and reports back with photos after every visit.

categories.title: Gardens & grounds
categories.blurb: The living part of your estate, kept sharp in every season.

categories.title: Exterior cleaning
categories.blurb: Where a tired property becomes a stunning one again.

categories.title: Stone & sealing
categories.blurb: Protection and shine for the surfaces that define your home.

categories.title: Repairs & upkeep
categories.blurb: The small fixes that keep a home feeling right.

categories.title: Specialist services
categories.blurb: The extras that make ownership effortless.

maintenancePage.planTitle: Tailored to your home — by the visit, or all year round.
maintenancePage.planBody: No two properties are alike — a clifftop villa on Ibiza and a golf-side estate in Sotogrande need very different care. So we don't sell packages off a shelf. Some owners call us for a single job — a one-off tidy before guests arrive, a tree taken down, a terrace brought back to life. Others want us there all year, one familiar team quietly keeping everything beyond the walls in order. Either way, we walk your property with you, listen to how you live in it, and tailor everything to your home personally — drawing on the five disciplines above, visit by visit and season by season. The price reflects your home, never a tier; and as your property changes, what we do quietly changes with it.

planSteps.title: We visit
planSteps.desc: A walk through your property together — every terrace, every tree.

planSteps.title: We tailor
planSteps.desc: One visit or a year of care, shaped to exactly what your home needs — nothing more.

planSteps.title: We care
planSteps.desc: One familiar team and a personal price, whether for a single job or every season.

maintenancePage.ctaSub: Tell us about your property — we will shape a plan around it.

contactPage.title: Tell us about your project.
contactPage.sub: A few details are all we need to begin. Tell us where your property is and what you have in mind, and the right person from our team will come back to you personally, usually within one working day.
contactPage.talkSub: Call, email or message us directly. We answer in English and Spanish.
contactPage.responseTitle: A reply within one working day
contactPage.responseBody: Every enquiry is read by a person, not a queue. We will be in touch personally to arrange a visit or a call.

both.note: We will help you work it out
